text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if you're going to take a break, why don't
you sit here next to me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You must be exhausted. Here, try—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose you can't really lie down here, can
you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I would've let you sleep on my lap, but you're
much taller than the kids.
